transcript: [Music] what's poppin this mellow back at you with another video and today i'm gonna be making some automatic melodies automatic we're gonna be making a beat with melody sauce 2. that's right eva b sent it over this is a sponsored video i'm gonna be showcasing the plugin showing you what it's capable of it's really good for if you want automatic melodies and you don't want to have to press everything in and you just want something at the click of a button because when you click a button it generates a melody so it's real good for when you have beat block or when you have to be highly productive and pump out a bunch of beats and it's also good as a creative starting point anything like that it's very convenient so i'm going to show you how this works and we're going to get into it but before we do i need you to put a like on the video and let's go so the first thing we're going to do we're going to get a chord progression all right that is a c minor or c sharp minor i'm gonna replace the piano to play the chords with the albion one strings so that's going to make it a lot easier for any melodic instrument to flow over so now let's get into melody sauce let's talk about melody sauce so with this plugin you can create melodies with the click of a button you can drag out the midi all that good stuff but now in the second edition you can actually hear the melody as it's playing so you can hear what you're gonna get on this side you know we have the key i'm going to go to c sharp minor all the minors are on the right all the majors are on the left now you got different speeds you see we got the loop length i'm gonna put it to that you got the octaves and all that stuff but this you got two different methods of making melodies when it comes to free with this mode you have this over here you have light dark all that determines the type of notes that it picks and you also have simple complex and all and that really determines the type of rhythms and things like that that you get in the melody so with that being said being that i have it in this mode i'm going to click some melodies just so you can hear them let's click dark and simple and then let's click it again and let's even click this again now with each of these these are all different melodies i'm going to click play on this it generates different melodies each time you click it so you can pick the instrument here and this will show you what it'll sound like you know if you put a similar instrument down so we're gonna play this right now see how the first melody sounds let's try to push it medium speed let's do another one that's one of the complex ones i like that one actually i love that actually i really like that so i'm gonna put a star next to that you know when i click the star that's going to show up as one of the favorite melodies that i've created from the bash let's go to all in all see what we come up with i'm going to click that twice to see two melodies so let's let's hear let's put it medium so i got some really dope melodies when you go to the style tab this is actually something new you know you could click here and they have different styles of melodies that it can create for different genres in different instruments within that genre right now we're using a push ic style you know chord progression and stuff like that so we're gonna go to the trap and we're gonna pick something like pluck exotic plucks so we're gonna click that and once i click it that creates another melody let's listen to it let's click it again see another one let's speed it up now another feature that they have is chord matching you see we're in a c sharp minor so that would be the first chord it has b minor as a second chord but that is not the chord we're playing over a major is the second chord so instead of doing that we're going to set up a major is both of these that way the melody is gonna match you know some of the notes that fit with the chord now you see how with the chord matches change some of the notes to fit better with the chords within that same key that i already chose now another gem that's a part of this is you can actually harmonize the melody that you have you got high mid low and you also have octaves which is basically what that is so let's listen to some of these and how they sound so i'm gonna do this one the last melody i made melody number seven i'm vibing with that the most i'm gonna drag that in as its own midi i'm going to mute melody sauce i'm going to use the omega 1 shot kit which is a one shot kit that i will be dropping soon it's not out yet i'm going to use this guitar we got a good melody right there i'm gonna make another melody to go above that i like that as a top top top melody so i'm gonna mute this i'm gonna take that melody 13 i'm gonna put it on a midi i'm gonna take that and just like that we have a cohesive melody we actually have two melodies which we got the lower melody that i put down and then we have the counter melody which is above the main melody so that was created just with some clicks it took a while for me to show you everything but it was very very simple so now i'm gonna do some things with the harmonic layers and after that we'll pretty much be gucci and we will get to some processing and some drums [Laughter] uh that's a good set right there pretty much got to be pretty much got a banger and it was very simple like clockwork before we get to the final beat if you like what you heard be sure to click the link in the description to get melody sauce too so you can make melodies at the click of a button i will be back with more tutorials soon other than that i'll see y'all another day somehow some way i'm out you
